page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Kronos is a highly flexible Python-based software tool that mainly enables bioinformatics developers, i.e. bioinformaticians who develop workflows for analyzing genomic data, to quickly make a workflow.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: A workflow assembler for cancer genome analytics and informatics.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A workflow assembler for cancer genome analytics and informatics.
